headline: Private equity stocks down 30-40% in three months, bigger worry than geopolitical risk
summary: John Davies, CIO at Astoria Portfolio Advisors, isn’t losing sleep over geopolitical headlines. What’s keeping him up at night is something closer to home in the financial system: the rapid unraveling of private equity and private credit stocks. “I think the bigger concern I have is more about what’s going on in the private equity ... Private equity stocks down 30-40% in three months, bigger worry than geopolitical risk

headline: JPMorgan Tightens Lending to Private Credit, Reports Says. KKR Stock, Blackstone Rise.
summary: The bank marks down the value of software loans in private credit portfolios in yet another blow to alt managers, according to multiple reports.

headline: JPMorgan Chase reins in lending to private credit firms after marking down software loans
summary: JPMorgan's move shows that the biggest U.S. bank by assets wants to get ahead of potential turbulence involving private credit loans to software companies.

raw.headline: JPMorgan Chase reins in lending to private credit firms after marking down software loans
